Review.title: Internal Place Review
Review.description: User generated review for a specific place within the app.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the reviewer

userName.description: The display name of the reviewer

userPhoto.description: The profile photo URL of the reviewer

photoBase64.description: Optional attached photo in base64 format

Favorite.title: User Favorite Place
Favorite.description: A place saved by a user for quick access.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user

Visit.title: User Visit Record
Visit.description: Track places a user has looked at to remind them to rate later.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user

rated.description: Whether this visit has been rated

/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Global collection of all user reviews

/visits/{visitId}.description: Track user visits for rating reminders
